emails.subject: Re: Pasadena
emails.body: Re: Pasadena You quoted $5.10 as the total spread you would pay. So: $6 $5.1 $11.10 Question: What is the credit you will give Pasadena time their capactiy of 3886 MMBtu/d? Answer: To figure out what you are paying for the capacity: Assume SJ Index 6.00 Then, Basin Price/(1 Fuel + Variable Cost Demand Charge (Kim's for Pasadena) Border Index Demand Charge Border Index $.026 (Basin Price/(1- .0388)) x 11.10 .026 6.00/(.9612) 11.10 .0266 6.2422 $4.83 is the implied demand charge $4.83 3,886 29 Total Credit Chris
